Truvio Commerce Serialized package: swift 2.3 (scaffolding-only)

WHAT THIS IS
  A scaffolding-only Swift baseline: framework (payments, shipping, VAT,
  currencies, countries, order states, URL routing, Customer Center user
  groups) plus starter site content and pages. It ships ZERO sample catalog
  — no products, groups, prices, variants or discounts. Author the demo
  catalog per-demo (see the dw-demo-pim recipes); this baseline only lays the
  ground it sits on.

DISTRIBUTION
  There are no release zips. Get the package by cloning this repository (or a
  sparse-checkout of packages/swift/2.3) at the commit you want to reproduce.
  Record that commit SHA in your demo's CUSTOMISATIONS.md as the pin.

INSTALL (Management API — no admin-UI upload)
  1. Copy this package's config/, deploy/ and seed/ into the host:
       config/swift-2.3.json  ->  wwwroot/Files/System/Serializer/Serializer.config.json
       deploy/                ->  wwwroot/Files/System/Serializer/SerializeRoot/deploy/
       seed/                  ->  wwwroot/Files/System/Serializer/SerializeRoot/seed/
  2. Deploy pass (source-wins framework):
       POST /Admin/Api/SerializerDeserialize
       Authorization: Bearer <Management API key>
  3. Seed pass (destination-wins starter content):
       POST /Admin/Api/SerializerDeserialize?mode=Seed
       Authorization: Bearer <Management API key>
     Both passes run under strict mode (schema drift escalates). The bare POST
     runs Deploy only; the Seed pass needs the explicit ?mode=Seed.

  There is no "Settings -> Developer -> Serialize -> Upload Package" screen on
  the current engine — the Management API deserialize above is the flow.

See: https://github.com/justdynamics/Truvio.Commerce.Serializer.Baselines
